prompt: Add deduplicate_by_email(profiles), treating email case and surrounding whitespace as insignificant while preserving the first profile and input order. Add tests and run the suite.

argv: import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'src'); from profiles import deduplicate_by_email; items=[{'id':1,'email':' A@Example.com '},{'id':2,'email':'a@example.com'},{'id':3,'email':'b@example.com'}]; assert [x['id'] for x in deduplicate_by_email(items)] == [1,3]
